summary: POS Module Testing Complete - Tested POS Terminal, Cashier Sessions, Cashier Login pages and all related API endpoints. Fixed missing /api/pos/inventory endpoint. All 15 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - not blocking functionality (known issue from previous iteration)

pos_terminal_page.page_loads: Page loads at /pos with all components
pos_terminal_page.quick_items_grid: Quick Items grid displays inventory items
pos_terminal_page.cart_panel: Cart panel with customer selector visible

cashier_sessions_page.dashboard_cards: Total Sales, Transactions, Cash, Card, Live Sessions, Variance cards visible
cashier_sessions_page.live_sessions_tab: Live Sessions tab present and working

cashier_login_page.login_method_toggle: Password and Quick PIN buttons present

sidebar_navigation.pos_terminal_link: POS Terminal link present in sidebar
sidebar_navigation.cashier_sessions_link: Cashier Sessions link present in sidebar

backend_apis.cashier_login: POST /api/cashier/login works for admin (returns 401 for invalid creds)

bug_fix_applied.issue: Missing /api/pos/inventory endpoint - POSPage.jsx was calling this endpoint but it didn't exist in pos.py router
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added GET /api/pos/inventory endpoint to /app/backend/routers/pos.py that returns inventory items with POS-relevant fields (id, barcode, sku, name, price, on_hand_qty, etc.)

context_for_next_testing_agent: POS module fully tested and working. All 4 POS-related routes (/pos, /cashier-sessions, /cashier-login, /cashier-pos) are accessible. POS and Cashier routers properly included in server.py. The cashier-login and cashier-pos pages are public pages for cashier use (don't require main app auth).
